_comment: AC-72 scenario registry. Stores ONLY overlay diffs vs canonical baseline — no full policy values. Each scenario_id is stable and must not be renamed without a registry schema bump.
description: Named policy scenarios for controlled what-if simulation. The baseline scenario has an empty overlay and reads all values from the canonical policy file. Variant scenarios store only the parameters that differ from baseline.

scenarios.description: Canonical baseline — all values from allocation_memory_policy.json, no overlay applied.
Raise positive gate confidence 0.75→0.85 (fewer positive corrections).
Lower positive gate confidence 0.75→0.60 (more positive corrections).
Increase negative blend 0.50→0.70 and cap 0.05→0.07 (stronger braking).
Decrease negative blend 0.50→0.25 and cap 0.05→0.025 (gentler braking).
Raise negative gate confidence 0.50→0.65 (memory acts less often).
Allow positive memory when cycle is negative (loosen conflict gate).
Extreme parameters beyond safe limits — expected HIGH_RISK/TOO_RISKY.
